nfiu:STR.nfiu:Narrative: On 15 March 2026, the Transaction Monitoring System flagged a wire transfer of NGN 45,000,000 from the account of John Okafor Eze (Account: 0012345678) to Sample Trading Company LLC in Dubai, UAE. The alert was triggered due to: (1) The transaction amount is significantly inconsistent with the customer's declared income as a mid-level civil servant with monthly salary of NGN 350,000; (2) The account received multiple inward transfers totalling NGN 62,000,000 from five different accounts over the preceding 7 days, suggesting layering activity; (3) The beneficiary is domiciled in a jurisdiction associated with trade-based money laundering. Internal investigation confirmed no legitimate trade documentation (Form M) was provided. The customer's account was opened 3 months ago and has shown a pattern of rapid fund accumulation followed by large outward transfers. Enhanced monitoring has been applied and the account has been restricted pending further review.
nfiu:STR.nfiu:ActionTaken: Account restricted. Enhanced monitoring applied. STR filed within 24 hours of determination.

nfiu:Signature.nfiu:CertificationStatement: I/We certify that this report is filed in compliance with the NFIU Act 2018, the Money Laundering (Prevention and Prohibition) Act 2022, and the Terrorism (Prevention and Prohibition) Act 2022. The information provided is true, accurate, and complete to the best of our knowledge.
